feedItems.description: allocated £51.0m to Roads & Transport (≈£68 per resident)
allocated £283.2m to Adult Social Care (≈£380 per resident)
allocated £142.2m to Children's Social Care (≈£191 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £80 (5.0%) to £1682
